title: Chat games
description: Adds fun automated chat-based mini games like math, word scramble, reverse words, and trivia with rewards for the fastest correct answer.
body:
# 🎮 ChatGames (Fabric)

ChatGames is a lightweight chat-based mini game mod for Minecraft that adds fun, interactive challenges directly into your chat!

Perfect for singleplayer and casual multiplayer fun.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎯 Multiple Game Types
- 🧮 Fast Math (multiplication challenges)
- 🔤 Word Scramble
- ⚡ Reaction Game

### 🔥 Difficulty System
Choose your challenge level:
- Easy
- Medium
- Hard
- Insane

Harder difficulty = bigger numbers & tougher challenges.

Use:
`/chatgame difficulty hard`

---

### 🏆 Win Streak Multiplier
- Consecutive wins increase XP rewards
- Up to 3x XP multiplier
- Streak resets if you lose

---

### 🎁 Random Reward System
- Random item rewards
- Configurable reward pool
- Rare reward chance
- Rare reward broadcast
- Random stack amounts
- Drops item if inventory is full

---

### ⏳ Timeout Answer Reveal
If no one answers in time:
- The correct answer is revealed automatically
- Streak resets properly

---

### 🌈 Clean Chat UI
- Rainbow styled "CHAT GAMES" prefix
- Clean formatted messages
- Instant start (no countdown)

---

## ⚙ Fully Configurable

Config file:  
`.minecraft/config/chatgames.json`

You can customize:
- Cooldown time
- Timeout duration
- XP reward amount
- Rare reward chance
- Common & rare reward pools

---

## 🧪 Commands
/chatgame start
/chatgame stop
/chatgame difficulty easy|medium|hard|insane


---

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.x
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

## 💡 Designed For
- Singleplayer fun
- Casual survival worlds
- Lightweight mini-games
- Chat-based gameplay

---

Made with ❤️ by Anbu
